Adds an event to firebase
addition_isCorrect() - Method in class com.example.junimoapp.ExampleUnitTest
 
addOrEditEvent(Event) - Static method in class com.example.junimoapp.Organizer.EventData
adds or edits an event
addOrganizedEvent(Event) - Method in class com.example.junimoapp.models.User
 
addUser(User, CollectionReference) - Method in class com.example.junimoapp.firebase.FirebaseManager
Adds a user to firebase
AdminBrowseEventsActivity - Class in com.example.junimoapp.admin
AdminBrowseEventsActivity allows an administrator to view all events stored in Firestore and permanently delete any of them.
AdminBrowseEventsActivity() - Constructor for class com.example.junimoapp.admin.AdminBrowseEventsActivity
 
AdminBrowseOrganizersActivity - Class in com.example.junimoapp.admin
activity for admin to browse/remove organizers diaplays list of all organizers, allows admin to demote organizers to users and deletes all events they made Implements User story 03.05.01
AdminBrowseOrganizersActivity() - Constructor for class com.example.junimoapp.admin.AdminBrowseOrganizersActivity
 
AdminBrowseProfilesActivity - Class in com.example.junimoapp.admin
Activity where admins can browse and remove user profiles Implements user story 03.02.01
AdminBrowseProfilesActivity() - Constructor for class com.example.junimoapp.admin.AdminBrowseProfilesActivity
 
AdminEventAdapter - Class in com.example.junimoapp.admin
AdminEventAdapter is a RecyclerView adapter used by AdminBrowseEventsActivity.
AdminEventAdapter(List<AdminEventAdapter.EventItem>, AdminEventAdapter.OnDeleteClickListener) - Constructor for class com.example.junimoapp.admin.AdminEventAdapter
Constructor for AdminEventAdapter.
AdminEventAdapter.EventItem - Class in com.example.junimoapp.admin
EventItem is a simple data container (a "model") for one row in the events list.
AdminEventAdapter.EventViewHolder - Class in com.example.junimoapp.admin
EventViewHolder holds references to the views inside one event row (item_admin_event.xml).
AdminEventAdapter.OnDeleteClickListener - Interface in com.example.junimoapp.admin
OnDeleteClickListener is a callback interface.
AdminHomeActivity - Class in com.example.junimoapp.admin
AdminHomeActivity is the main home page for admin to browse (and delete) events/profiles/images (and later notifications, too) User stories: 03.01.01, 03.02.01, 03.03.01
AdminHomeActivity() - Constructor for class com.example.junimoapp.admin.AdminHomeActivity
 
AdminOrganizerAdapter - Class in com.example.junimoapp.admin
RecyclerView Adapter for browsing organizers as an admin Takes list of OrganizerItem objects, binds them to layout for display
AdminOrganizerAdapter(List<AdminOrganizerAdapter.OrganizerItem>, AdminOrganizerAdapter.OnDemoteClickListener) - Constructor for class com.example.junimoapp.admin.AdminOrganizerAdapter
Constructs adapter
AdminOrganizerAdapter.OnDemoteClickListener - Interface in com.example.junimoapp.admin
interface for remove organizer status button clicks (demote button)
AdminOrganizerAdapter.OrganizerItem - Class in com.example.junimoapp.admin
simple class for holding one organizer row
AdminOrganizerAdapter.OrganizerViewHolder - Class in com.example.junimoapp.admin
VieHolder class for one organizer row, chaches references for efficiency
AdminUnitTest - Class in com.example.junimoapp
Unit tests for admin functionality.
AdminUnitTest() - Constructor for class com.example.junimoapp.AdminUnitTest
 
AdminUserAdapter - Class in com.example.junimoapp.admin
Adapter for browsing profiles as an admin, takes a list of UserItem objects and makes them into the item_admin_user layout (so admins can browse them) using a RecyclerView
AdminUserAdapter(List<AdminUserAdapter.UserItem>, AdminUserAdapter.OnDeleteClickListener) - Constructor for class com.example.junimoapp.admin.AdminUserAdapter
Constructs the adapter
AdminUserAdapter.OnDeleteClickListener - Interface in com.example.junimoapp.admin
interface to handle delete button clicks
AdminUserAdapter.UserItem - Class in com.example.junimoapp.admin
simple class to hold the info for one user row, containing all of their info for ease of use
AdminUserAdapter.UserViewHolder - Class in com.example.junimoapp.admin
The ViewHolder class, holds the view for one user row, cachine the view references
